hooks.command: [ -f CODEINDEX.md ] && cat CODEINDEX.md | jq -Rs '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "SessionStart", additionalContext: .}}' || echo '{}'

BLOCKED=$(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print('yes' if str(d.get('file_path','')).endswith('model.rs') else 'no')" 2>/dev/null); [ "$BLOCKED" = "yes" ] && { echo 'BLOCKED: model.rs is FROZEN per CLAUDE.md -- do not modify the Burn 0.20 architecture.' >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0

f=$(cat) && echo "$f" | grep -q '.rs' && root=$(pwd) && rg '^pub (fn|struct|enum|trait|type|const)' --type rust -n whisperforge-core/src whisperforge/src whisperforge-convert/src whisperforge-diarize/src whisperforge-align/src 2>/dev/null | sed "s|^$root/||" > CODEINDEX.md || true
